About dimensions: All dimensions are measured manually. Minor deviations may result from variable measurement techniques or slight product deformation. The actual product shall prevail.
About colour variation: Due to differences in photography conditions or display settings, minor colour deviations may occur. These deviations are negligible and will not affect colour confirmation. The actual item is the final reference.
Used condition: Most products are pre-owned and will have varying degrees of wear. Customers with high standards for perfection are advised not to purchase.
Authenticity guarantee: All products are 100% genuine. In case of an authenticity dispute, the product must be sent to a professional third-party authentication body for appraisal.
